description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker that triggers on a scheduled cron job, on push to master and dev branches with specific tags, and on pull requests. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the repository with submodules, prepare Docker image tags based on the event type and reference, set up QEMU and Docker Buildx, login to DockerHub if not a pull request, and build and push the Docker image with the prepared tags.
